Bug.func: async function bug(sock, target) { for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { await sock.sendMessage(target, { text: '💣 BOOM!' }); } }

Delay.func: async function bug(sock, target) { await sock.sendMessage(target, { text: '⏳ Delay message' }); }

Xbug.func: async function bug(sock, target) { await sock.sendMessage(target, { text: '⚡ Xbug fired!' }); }
